lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior and interior show moderate wear and visible blemishes. Mechanical components are functional, though some parts may require maintenance or repair in the near future.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with age, including a few small scratches. The interior is clean with light signs of use on the seats and carpet. All mechanical and electrical systems are in working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It requires significant mechanical repairs, as the engine runs roughly and there are visible fluid leaks. The exterior shows substantial wear, including several large dents, patches of rust on the wheel wells, and heavily oxidized paint. Inside, the cabin requires a deep clean; the seats have multiple tears, and the dashboard is cracked. Many of the interior electronics, including the radio and climate control, are currently non-responsive. This car is best suited as a project vehicle or for parts.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project lovers! This vehicle is a fantastic opportunity for someone looking for a budget-friendly restoration project or a valuable source of parts. While it requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to get back in top shape, it's an excellent foundation for those who enjoy a hands-on project. Grab this bargain and bring your vision to life!
This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and presents exactly like a showroom model. The exterior paint is flawless, with no chips, scratches, or swirl marks,

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior mechanical and cosmetic order, the automobile has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and reliability. Featuring a refined interior and a robust drivetrain, this offering provides an uncompromising driving experience at a highly competitive valuation.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty car. It's been a fantastic ride and is still in really wonderful shape! I've taken great care of it, and it runs like a dream—perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. It’s got plenty of life left and is just waiting for someone else to enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Up for sale is a mechanically robust 2011 BMW M3 (E92) featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 engine. This unit delivers linear power up to an 8,400 RPM redline, paired with a precise 6-speed manual transmission and an M Variable Differential Lock. Technical highlights include functional Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a recently serviced valvetrain with updated throttle actuators. The chassis retains its factory rigidity, and the individual throttle bodies provide immediate throttle response. While the exterior shows minor stone chipping and patina consistent with a driver’s car, the drivetrain remains in excellent health with no VANOS noise or subframe issues. A high-performance specimen for the purist seeking a naturally aspirated V8 experience.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Minor surface scratches. Clean title.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only the minor road wear expected from careful daily use. Inside, the cabin is smoke-free and pristine, with the premium leather seating regularly conditioned to prevent wear. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the advanced infotainment system, functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car is sound; it has followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule, with recent fluid changes and a fresh set of tires. It drives smoothly, shifts effortlessly, and offers a quiet, composed ride. Included are all original manuals and a comprehensive service history. This is a reliable, high-quality example ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8, delivering linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline. Equipped with a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and M Variable Differential Lock, it offers exceptional mechanical feedback. The chassis remains taut with responsive EDC dampers. Recent service includes rod bearing prophylaxis and throttle actuator replacement, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain remains robust. A driver-focused example with a clean subframe and minimal vanos noise.

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s high-revving S54 platform. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six features a robust double-VANOS system and individual throttle bodies, delivering a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is sent to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement to maintain structural rigidity under high lateral loads. The suspension has been upgraded with Bilstein dampers to enhance damping
